instructions.en: Fill in the two `__fill_me__` statements inside `createServer()`: respond with `"Hello!"` when the route is `GET /hello`, and with `"Bye!"` when it's `GET /bye`. All other routes already return 404.
instructions.pt: Preencha as duas instruções `__fill_me__` dentro de `createServer()`: responda com `"Hello!"` na rota `GET /hello` e com `"Bye!"` na rota `GET /bye`. Todas as outras rotas já retornam 404.
instructions.es: Rellena las dos instrucciones `__fill_me__` dentro de `createServer()`: responde con `"Hello!"` en la ruta `GET /hello` y con `"Bye!"` en `GET /bye`. El resto de rutas ya devuelven 404.
instructions.de: Fülle die beiden `__fill_me__`-Anweisungen in `createServer()` aus: Antworte mit `"Hello!"` für die Route `GET /hello` und mit `"Bye!"` für `GET /bye`. Alle anderen Routen geben bereits 404 zurück.
instructions.it: Compila le due istruzioni `__fill_me__` all'interno di `createServer()`: rispondi con `"Hello!"` per la rotta `GET /hello` e con `"Bye!"` per `GET /bye`. Tutte le altre rotte restituiscono già 404.
instructions.fr: Remplis les deux instructions `__fill_me__` dans `createServer()` : réponds avec `"Hello!"` pour la route `GET /hello` et avec `"Bye!"` pour `GET /bye`. Toutes les autres routes renvoient déjà 404.

tests: const server = createServer(); await new Promise((r) => server.listen(3010, r)); const res = await fetch('http://localhost:3010/hello'); const text = await res.text(); await new Promise((r) => server.close(r)); expect(text).toBe('Hello!');

const server2 = createServer(); await new Promise((r) => server2.listen(3011, r)); const res2 = await fetch('http://localhost:3011/bye'); const text2 = await res2.text(); await new Promise((r) => server2.close(r)); expect(text2).toBe('Bye!');

const server3 = createServer(); await new Promise((r) => server3.listen(3012, r)); const res3 = await fetch('http://localhost:3012/unknown'); await new Promise((r) => server3.close(r)); expect(res3.status).toBe(404);
